# zstack_certificate (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage Certificates in ZStack. A Certificate is used for SSL/TLS termination in load balancers and other services.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `certificate` (String) The PEM-encoded certificate content.
- `name` (String) The name of the Certificate.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the Certificate.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the Certificate.
